title: Tibouchina martialis
taxonomy: Tibouchina martialis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is commonly known as the "merendera family" and includes over 150 genera of plants. Melastomataceae is a large and diverse family of flowering plants found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. intro: Tibouchina martialis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "blue glory tree" or "Lavender Sage" due to its vibrant purple flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular natural remedy for wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
